evidence_summary: Alnylam Europe AG is a 100% wholly owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. According to SEC filings (Exhibit 21.1), Alnylam Europe AG is incorporated in Germany and is listed as a subsidiary of the registrant. Historically, Alnylam Europe AG was formed through the acquisition of Ribopharma AG in 2003, which was subsequently renamed.
